items.name_en: ICARE Original_
items.name_cn:
ICARE Original_
With the rise of the "small bag" trend, major brands have been making their bags smaller. While fashionistas use them for looks, they often need a larger tote to carry essentials like phones, water bottles, and umbrellas. Hearing this need, Y launched a new bag this season called ICARE, named after the Greek myth character Icarus. The 3D letter combination in the center of the Nappa leather is avant-garde and commanding. The brand's creative director also stated this handbag will be the most eye-catching new arrival. For those who can't rely on a small bag for daily outings, Icare's spacious capacity and clean design are perfect for you!
Model: 698651
Large Bag Dimensions: Opening Width 58cm
 Bottom Width 47cm
 Height (with handle) 61cm
 Bottom Side Width 8cm
Small Bag Dimensions: 27x13x8cm

items.name_en: Ice Grey 🎉Prada new nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody 😘😘 viral among internet influencers and popular in the fashion circle! items.name_en: Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU Small Bag, hand-stitched with 306 large visible stitches, representing the Selleria classic craftsmanship passed down by FENDI artisans since 1925. Selected Cuoio Romano leather, calfskin with natural grain, tanned without any metal. Lined with calfskin, divided into two exposed interior compartments by a Cuoio Romano leather hard partition, with an interior pocket. Silver Selleria plaque, silver-finished metal fittings. Classic turn-lock on both sides. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody

items.name_en: Icy Plum Lambskin
items.name_cn:
Icy Plum Lambskin
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

items.name_cn: In stock

specs.rawTitle: In stock

items.name_en: In stock
items.name_cn:
In stock
Inspired by Brancusi's 20th-century modern sculpture "Bird in Space"
Muse brass handle, unique craftsmanship makes each handle one-of-a-kind, highlighting a precious sculptural feel
The shoulder strap features a metal chain with hardware inlay, adding depth to the bag; the hardware moon god design exudes a premium look
The Sardine handle creates a high-end modern look! The Sardine bag uses Intrecciato weaving to honor the brand's craftsmanship. The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)

The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)
